title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 13–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Tama, Unknown person #15, Zoro, Luffy as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna make a run for it, Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kamuiro!! What the hell are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just pinched my cheek with pliers, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though he wouldn't be able to get any kibidango using them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hmm!? So, you're coming for me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GRR RRR RRRR RRRR RRRR RIRR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm fine!! You've already saved me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch... this is the power of the chasing sword...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Talking it out is futile... Luffy is enraged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: She smiles just like a horse, too!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
